message:
feat(conformance,runtime): implement ASUPERSYNC governance gates, property tests, and runtime skeleton

Conformance crate (fp-conformance):
- Cargo.toml: add dependencies for property testing and governance gate
  infrastructure
- src/lib.rs (+726 lines): major expansion implementing governance gate
  modules, property-based test generators for DataFrame operation
  invariants, and structured logging contracts for conformance evidence
  collection
- src/bin/fp-governance-gate.rs: minor fix to governance gate binary
  entry point aligning with new lib.rs module structure
- tests/ag_e2e.rs (+67 lines): new end-to-end test suite validating
  the full governance gate pipeline from DataFrame operation through
  conformance evidence emission and structured log verification

Runtime crate (fp-runtime):
- src/lib.rs (+261 lines): implement ASUPERSYNC module skeleton
  providing the concurrency primitives and structure analysis
  foundation that the conformance layer validates against — includes
  async task coordination, DataFrame partition management, and
  cross-thread safety contracts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,10 @@ name = "fp-conformance"
 version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
 
+[features]
+default = []
+asupersync = ["fp-runtime/asupersync"]
+
 [dependencies]
 fp-columnar = { path = "../fp-columnar" }
 fp-frame = { path = "../fp-frame" }
